/usr/bin/ar qc libcauldron_core.a CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Actor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Assets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/CoatMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/CurseVector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Effect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/InputHandler.cxx.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/MainMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Pickup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Reagent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Scenery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cauldron_core.dir/src/Sprite.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcauldron_core.a
